title: monardella tortifolia
intro: Monardella tortifolia, also known as Purple Sage, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used by indigenous people for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Traditionally, Purple Sage has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antiviral properties.
